properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v5 v6 v11 v12 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus have my heart, My will, my soul Jesus have my hopes, My dreams, my world.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With joy I lay it down With joy I cast my crowns Jesus have it all!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To You I bring my praise, My lips, my song. A living sacrifice as one reborn.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Your life is now my own Your will is what I want. Jesus have it all!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus have it all Jesus have it all To You belongs the glory The praise of all the world

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jesus have it all Jesus have it all All blessing and all honor All majesty and awe Jesus have it all

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Jesus have Your church, Your love, Your bride The joy for which you freely gave your life

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Radiant in white Washed and purified Jesus have us all.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Jesus have Your worth, Your due, Your sum The praise of every nation, tribe, and tongue

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Let all that has been made, Glorify Your name, Jesus have it all.

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: /: All my days All my life Have it all. :/
